title: Western Cape real estate: Where views, value and vibrancy collide only with SEEFF Knysna
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Western Cape's property market is turning heads in 2025 and for good reason! With its unbeatable combo of natural beauty, strong infrastructure, and lifestyle appeal, the province is buzzing with activity from Cape Town to the coast.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Western Cape's property market is turning heads in 2025 and for good reason! With its unbeatable combo of natural beauty, strong infrastructure, and lifestyle appeal, the province is buzzing with activity from Cape Town to the coast."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Semigration continues to shake things up, with families and professionals packing up their Gauteng lives and heading for greener pastures in Stellenbosch, Paarl, and the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spacious homes, fresh air and wine farms? Yes, please.Coastal towns like Langebaan, Yzerfontein, and St Helena Bay are no longer just for holidaymakers. With remote work becoming the norm, these seaside spots are now hotbeds of permanent living and homes are selling faster than a beachside ice cream in summer.","html":"Spacious homes, fresh air and wine farms? Yes, please.
Coastal towns like Langebaan, Yzerfontein, and St Helena Bay are no longer just for holidaymakers. With remote work becoming the norm, these seaside spots are now hotbeds of permanent living and homes are selling faster than a beachside ice cream in summer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A Little Seeff Knysna spiceIn Knysna, Seeff is leading the way. Think luxury homes on Thesen Island, smart estates in Pezula, and waterfront living with your own private dock. The team at Seeff Knysna reports strong demand from local and international buyers seeking lifestyle, security and value. As our very own CEO of Seeff Gail Rimbault says: \"Knysna isn't just a destination, it's a lifestyle\".","html":"A Little Seeff Knysna spice
In Knysna, Seeff is leading the way. Think luxury homes on Thesen Island, smart estates in Pezula, and waterfront living with your own private dock. The team at Seeff Knysna reports strong demand from local and international buyers seeking lifestyle, security and value. As our very own CEO of Seeff Gail Rimbault says: \"Knysna isn't just a destination, it's a lifestyle\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Back in the metro, sustainable living is booming, with eco-conscious homes, solar panels, rainwater tanks, and sleek green design becoming a top priority. Developments like Cape Town's Fynbos are setting the standard.","html":"Back in the metro, sustainable living is booming, with eco-conscious homes, solar panels, rainwater tanks, and sleek green design becoming a top priority. Developments like Cape Town's Fynbos are setting the standard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, rentals are thriving in areas like Table View and Milnerton, as high interest rates nudge many toward flexible living. With over R120b in planned infrastructure upgrades, the Western Cape isn't just growing, it's glowing.","html":"Meanwhile, rentals are thriving in areas like Table View and Milnerton, as high interest rates nudge many toward flexible living. With over R120b in planned infrastructure upgrades, the Western Cape isn't just growing, it's glowing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
